CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(Type, "Souscription"), OR( ISPICKVAL(Motif_Souscription__c,"Contrat offert suite MES"), ISPICKVAL(Motif_Souscription__c,"Contrat offert suite Dépannage HC facturé"), ISPICKVAL(Motif_Souscription__c,"Contrat offert suite VF facturée"), ISPICKVAL(Motif_Souscription__c,"Offre CMISTE"), ISPICKVAL(Motif_Souscription__c,"Client souhaite un contrat") )), true, false)
CustomField.label: TECH contrat souscription
